hook: Brewed Tuesday. On your doorstep Friday.
body_copy: Single-origin Ethiopian Yirgacheffe, slow-steeped for 18 hours. The freshest cold brew you'll ever drink — because we ship it to you within 72 hours of brewing.
concept: Process-led storytelling. Close-ups of the slow-steep brewing process intercut with packaging and shipping shots. Voiceover from founder Maya.
retrieval_text: Process storytelling. Founder voiceover. Brewing close-ups. Targets considered consumers who care about ingredient quality. Strong on freshness narrative.

hook: POV: you finally found a cold brew worth the price
body_copy: 18-hour slow steep. Notes of bergamot and dark chocolate. Try it once, you'll know.
cta: Link in bio — first bottle 30% off
concept: Native-feeling handheld pour shot, captions on. Clean countertop aesthetic, natural light.
retrieval_text: POV-style hook. Handheld pour. Tasting notes specificity. Works because it sounds like a real person, not an ad. Top TikTok performer.

hook: The morning ritual deserves better than the same.
body_copy: Three single-origin cold brews. Three distinct mornings. Subscribe and save 20%.
concept: Three-card carousel showing each origin (Ethiopia, Colombia, Guatemala) with tasting notes. Cream backgrounds, Espresso typography.
retrieval_text: Multi-origin storytelling. Subscription push. Carousel format. Underperformed because subscription ask came too early in awareness funnel.

body_copy: If your morning coffee is just caffeine, you're missing the point. Northbean is the cold brew you actually look forward to.
concept: Direct talking-head from founder Maya, 30 seconds. No music, just her voice and product close-ups.
retrieval_text: Direct hook lacked specificity. Talking-head format without process visuals felt generic. Hook was too aggressive for our brand voice.

hook: The bean travels 7,000 miles. Then it sits with us for 18 hours.
body_copy: From a small farm in Yirgacheffe to your doorstep — slow-steeped, never rushed, never compromised.
concept: Origin-to-cup journey. Footage of farm in Ethiopia, transit, brewing facility, final pour. Editorial pacing.
retrieval_text: Origin storytelling. Cinematic pacing. Specificity of '7,000 miles' and '18 hours' drove engagement. Top performer for premium audience segments.
